creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Great, I think the simplest way forward is for you update the patches to alter MAINTAINER, and I will approve the PRs without further delay.

I'd also offer a suggestion to pass upstream:

As qterminal was originally intended to be desktop-independent tool dependent only on QT, I think a name change to something like lxqterminal would be in order now that development has become LXQT-dependent.  Likewise for the latest qtermwidget.
